login.title: Operator Login
login.subtitle: Authorized personnel only. All access attempts are logged.

register.title: Request Platform Access
register.subtitle: All registrations require administrator approval.
register.agree_terms: I acknowledge that all activity within ARGUX is monitored, logged, and subject to audit. Unauthorized access attempts will be reported.
register.success_message: Your access request has been submitted for review. A system administrator will verify your credentials.
register.success_notice: Expected approval time: 24–48 hours. You will receive a secure notification at the email provided.

two_factor.title: Identity Verification
two_factor.subtitle: Additional authentication required to access the platform.
two_factor.desc_app: Open your authenticator application and enter the 6-digit code displayed for ARGUX.
two_factor.desc_sms: A verification code has been sent to your registered mobile device ending in ••••47.
two_factor.desc_email: A verification code has been sent to your registered email address o••••r@argux.mil.
two_factor.invalid_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset Your Password
forgot.step1_desc: Enter your registered email address. A verification code will be sent through secure channels.
forgot.enter_code: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
forgot.success_message: Your password has been successfully reset. All other active sessions have been terminated for security.
forgot.audit_notice: This event has been recorded in the audit log.
